titles.title: A bill to amend the Railroad Retirement Act of 1974 to eliminate certain deductions for annuities under the Act.
A bill to amend the Railroad Retirement Act of 1974 to eliminate certain deductions for annuities under the Act.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
